articles.title: Pope Leo to meet with abuse victims and migrants during Spain visit
articles.excerpt: Tomorrow, around a million people are set to attend a Mass in the city centre.
articles.content:
POPE LEO XIV this morning departed from Rome for a seven-day visit to Spain, with which include meeting with abuse victims and migrants.
